context: Norway's 2025 chart was dominated by domestic breakouts: Tobias Sten placed multiple songs in the top 15, reflecting the powerful grip of local-language streaming on VG-lista. Norwegian acts Ari Bajgora and Emma Steinbakken showed strong appeal alongside Kjartan Lauritzen's Astrid S collaboration. International crossovers from ROSÉ, Bruno Mars, and Lady Gaga still claimed top-10 slots.
